notes: v241 — Simple mode now matches the new look everywhere. The Load buttons, the More tools button and the results pop-ups use the same crisp line icons as the rest of the app — including a small printer icon next to each share code that opens its report. Tidier section labels, a proper magnifier icon in the search box, and the 'market closed' notice shows a subtle pulsing dot instead of the red-circle emoji. Same app, same data — this finishes the v240 facelift in the spots Simple mode was still missing it.
